productDisplayName: Fastrack Women Cross Body Hobo Hand Bag
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this pink handbag from fastrack will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall or to college. And don't you be deceived by its compact look, for there's ample space to hold all your essentials!Made of nylon for durability and comfortOne large zippered compartment with a small zippered pocket and two smaller pouches inside to stash away essentialsOne roomy compartment with velcro closures at the back, along with a smaller zippered compartmentTwo zippered pockets on the frontSingle adjustable strap to hang the bag from the shoulderBranded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long lifeBrand name embroidered on the front in large letteringBrand tab appliqued on the sideCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
